data.body: Held-out remediation validated. Independent strong-tier implementer completed fixture-only support in 2 substantive attempts. Restored full oracle: 4/4 GREEN across Python/TypeScript and analyzer-present/absent. Defect-seeded mutations proved teeth: empty commit produced churn 0 vs expected 8/10 (2/2 RED); omitting claim produced empty attempts map vs [1] (2/2 RED); restored 4/4 GREEN. Focused metrics: 102 passed, 2 skipped. make lint GREEN; make typecheck GREEN; make test GREEN: 7124 passed, 29 skipped, 114 deselected.
